temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with long, dark, wavy hair and a distressed, angry expression stands in a dark, crowded crowd. He wears a dark, ornate, high-collared coat. His face is illuminated with a sickly green light, and his mouth is slightly open as if he is shouting or gasping. (Storyline: This shot introduces a key character, likely a villain or antagonist, establishing a tone of conflict and distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build.)
(00:02-00:04) A young man with light brown hair, wearing a patterned sweater over a collared shirt, stands in a dark, stone-walled corridor. He looks around with a wide-eyed, fearful expression, his mouth agape in shock and disbelief. (Storyline: This introduces a second character, likely a protagonist or hero, who is in a perilous or frightening situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful score continues, heightening the tension.)
